identity: a chibi office worker with long auburn hair, fair skin, and blue overalls over a white shirt.

idle.action: the SAME seated character at rest, a subtle idle (frame 1 sitting upright and relaxed, frame 2 a tiny breathing slump / blink) — almost no movement

type.action: the SAME seated character TYPING, both forearms raised and hands held out in front at typing height (as if on an invisible keyboard in their lap), the hands and fingers bobbing slightly up and down across the 4 frames while everything else stays still

walk.action: the SAME character in a side-view WALK CYCLE (contact, passing, contact, passing), seen from the side, feet on a common baseline
